temporal_description:
(00:00-00:08) In an office, a senior police officer in a white uniform with a tie speaks to his subordinate, who is also in a white shirt and tie. The senior officer gestures with his hand, emphasizing his instructions. The subordinate listens with a serious expression, looking down as he processes the orders. (Storyline: The scene establishes a police investigation. The senior officer is delegating a task to his subordinate, who is to work with the CIB (Criminal Intelligence Bureau) to open a locked device and retrieve a file.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:09-00:13) The subordinate, who is a forensics expert, looks up from his notes and asks a question with a concerned expression. The senior officer listens to his response. (Storyline: The forensics expert questions the urgency of the task, suggesting there might be a more appropriate way to handle the situation, possibly without force.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Questioning, cautious. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
